job.title: Change hero form button fill to a different color

report.jobTitle: Change hero form button fill to a different color

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Directive with a clear quoted replacement string and a clear target (the text layer nearest the pin, "Private Dining").

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: The comment 'this one too' gives no actionable instruction or clear target — it references some unstated prior action with no context to infer what change is wanted.
report.reply: I wasn't sure what you meant by 'this one too' — could you tell me what change you'd like applied here, or point me to the earlier comment this is following up on?
